meta.title: Clarifind | Clear training & learning for small teams
meta.description: Clear, practical learning design for small teams. Tell me what is messy, and I will give you a simple next step.
meta.ogTitle: Clarifind | Clear training & learning for small teams
meta.ogDescription: Clear, practical learning design for small teams. Tell me what is messy, and I will give you a simple next step.

hero.title: Training should feel clear and useful.
hero.subtitle: Share a bit of context and I’ll suggest a practical next step your team can actually use.
hero.lead: I help small organizations turn messy knowledge into clear training people can understand, use, and trust.
hero.microcopy: 15 minutes. No pressure. I reply within 2 business days.
hero.name: Dor Vadai
hero.trustLine: Practical, human, and ready to put to work.
hero.graphicAlt: Abstract diagram showing connected steps and clarity.

services.heading: Learning support your team can use right away.
services.lead: Pick what you need. I’ll shape the structure, content, and delivery so your team can learn faster without the overload.

learning.title: Learning products
learning.body: Courses, onboarding, and learning hubs that make complex knowledge simple and easy to follow.

workshops.title: Workshops & facilitation
workshops.body: Practical sessions that move people from confusion to shared understanding—without overload.

ai.title: AI-assisted learning tools
ai.body: Responsible AI helpers that make knowledge easier to access, practice, and apply.

clarity.title: Content clarity & structure
clarity.body: Turn messy docs into clear systems with naming, navigation, and content people can trust.

ctaBlock.title: Not sure what to fix first?
ctaBlock.body: Tell me what feels messy, and I’ll recommend the clearest next move.

steps.title: Quick kickoff
steps.body: We align on your goal, who this is for, and what success should look like.

steps.title: Build what matters
steps.body: I design the core flow and content, then refine it with short feedback loops.

steps.title: Launch with confidence
steps.body: You get polished materials and practical rollout support.

receipt.title: Clarifind Receipt
receipt.heading: What you’ll get
receipt.footer: Thank you for choosing practical learning.

examples.heading: Real examples of the problems I help solve
examples.lead: All examples are anonymized. If you want, I can share a similar case when we talk.

items.title: Turned a 50-page handbook into a 4-module onboarding path.
items.body: Reduced overwhelm and helped new hires find answers in week one.

items.title: Designed a client-facing course that reduced support tickets.
items.body: Short, guided lessons replaced endless back-and-forth.

items.title: Built a workshop for sales teams to practice new product demos.
items.body: Interactive sessions replaced static scripts and boosted confidence.

items.title: Created an AI assistant for quick policy lookups and training prompts.
items.body: Made policy guidance faster without losing compliance.

items.title: Reorganized internal docs so staff could find answers in minutes.
items.body: Information architecture cut search time dramatically.

items.title: Translated complex workflows into simple, step-by-step guides.
items.body: Process playbooks became usable across teams.

proof.heading: Proof without buzzwords.
proof.lead: Happy to share relevant references when we talk. Typical goals include:
items: Fewer support tickets and repeat questions
Higher adoption of tools and processes

metrics.label: Hours saved per team per month

testimonials.quote: “The content finally feels calm and navigable. Our team found what they needed without asking for help.”
“We went from confused onboarding to a clear 4-week path. New hires are productive sooner.”
“Shorter training, better retention, and less rework. That clarity made all the difference.”

proof.note: Have a specific goal? Tell me—I'll suggest the simplest path.

about.heading: About me
paragraphs: I design digital learning experiences that help people understand things quickly—not just click through content.
My background blends UX, learning design, and practical content strategy, with hands-on work across training programs, products, and knowledge tools.
I started Clarifind to help small teams build learning that is clear, useful, and realistic for everyday work.
about.skills: UX • Learning Design • Digital Training • Content Systems

pricing.heading: Clear, flexible pricing for small teams.
pricing.lead: Before we start, you get a clear scope and plan. Engagements stay flexible to match real timelines and budgets.

smallTeams.title: Small teams welcome
smallTeams.body: Clarifind specializes in right-sized projects that stay light, clear, and realistic for busy teams.
items: Scaled scope options to match your time and capacity.
Collaborative planning with no surprise complexity.
Flexible pacing when your team is in a busy season.

special.title: Special consideration
special.body: Discounts and adjusted packages are available for small businesses, non-profits, and organizations in arts, education, and social work.
special.note: Share your context and I’ll suggest a plan that feels respectful and doable.

contact.heading: Ready to make learning clearer?
contact.lead: Share a few details and I’ll reply with a practical recommendation and next step.

form.message: What are you trying to achieve?
form.privacy: Your details are only used to reply. No spam, ever.

helpers.name: So I know who I’m speaking with.
helpers.email: We’ll only use this to reply.
helpers.message: Share what success should look like.

placeholders.name: Jane Doe
placeholders.message: Share your goal, audience, and what feels messy right now.
